key_finding: Exp_014 was WRONG (pipeline bug). Qwen-Instruct shows REVERSED dissociation: destroying TC-selective positions crashes accuracy (-47pp gap at 3%/1.0x) while AC destruction has NO effect. H2O/TC protection is PERFECT (maintains 70% baseline at all noise fractions). Sharp cliff between 0.3x and 1.0x — zero effect below 0.3x.
pipeline_fix: Exp_014 teacher-forced FULL trace including '#### answer', generating from beyond → model started new questions → 0% accuracy. Fixed: truncate at '####', lookback re-computation, generate from end of reasoning.
evidence_impact: Major revision: (1) Exp_014 ultra-fragile finding INVALIDATED by pipeline bug. (2) Three encoding patterns now: concentrated/Qwen-Base (+24pp), distributed/Llama (+24pp), REVERSED/Qwen-Instruct (-47pp). (3) Instruction tuning reverses which positions are critical — TC becomes critical, AC dispensable. (4) H2O=TC>>Random>AC on Qwen-Instruct.
next_planned: Finer cliff sweep (0.4x-0.8x) on Qwen-Instruct to locate cliff precisely; OR additive noise on Llama-Instruct (exp_004/005 used replacement noise) to test if reversal is instruction-tuning-universal; OR positional analysis on Qwen-Instruct to disambiguate selectivity vs position effects
open_questions_answered: Q37: lower noise scales on Qwen-Instruct
Q40: SNR cliff location on Qwen-Instruct
new_open_questions: Q44: does Llama show reversal under additive noise?
Q45: does reversal replicate on other instruct models?

spatial_structure.status: Qwen-Base: PGD rho=0.78. Llama: position dominates. Qwen-Instruct: REVERSED (TC critical, AC dispensable)

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC perfect on Qwen-Instruct; TC best on Llama; AC fails on both

cross_model_replication.status: Three encoding regimes confirmed. Reversed dissociation is novel. Training > architecture

encoding_strategy.status: Qwen-Base=concentrated(+24pp), Llama=distributed(+24pp), Qwen-Instruct=reversed(-47pp). Sharp cliff at 0.3x-1.0x
